reference: Hello, my name is Pierre, and I am thirty-two years old. One month ago, I spent a day at the pool and went back to my house. I ate tuna with beetroots and, after two hours, went to bed. I woke up at three AM, and my hands, legs, and stomach were full of red bumps of different sizes. I went to the doctor immediately; she gave me a syringe and Xyzal for ten days and also asked me to avoid eating protein. I stopped eating and only consumed digestive aids plus a salad. Until now, I am still not cured. If I stop taking the pill, once I wake up, my body starts itching a bit, and red bumps appear all over my body. All day long, nothing appears; just when I sleep!
text: Hello, my name is Pierre and I am thirty-two years old. One month ago, I spent a day at the pool and went back to my house. I ate tuna with beetroot and after two hours went to bed. I woke up at three a.m. and my hands, legs, and stomach were full of red bumps of different sizes. I went to the doctor immediately. She gave me a syringe and Xzol for ten days and also asked me to avoid eating protein. I stopped eating and only consumed digestive aids plus a salad. Until now, I am still not cured. If I stop taking the pill, once I wake up, my body starts itching a bit and red bumps appear all over my body. All day long nothing appears, just when I sleep.
